name: us500_ema_pullback_trend_m15
hypothesis: On US500 M15 during the US cash session, pullbacks to EMA20 within an established EMA20>EMA50>EMA200 uptrend (and mirror downtrend) with RSI re-cross offer high-expectancy trend-continuation entries.

entry_rules.long: EMA20>EMA50>EMA200 AND low[1] <= EMA20 AND close > EMA20 AND RSI(14) crosses up through 50 AND close > high[1]
entry_rules.short: EMA20<EMA50<EMA200 AND high[1] >= EMA20 AND close < EMA20 AND RSI(14) crosses down through 50 AND close < low[1]

regime_filter.rationale: Need persistent directional regime with live volatility; exclude both dead tape and blow-off volatility.

exits.stop_loss: 1.2*ATR(14) below swing low (long) / above swing high (short)
